column1: 説明を聞いても、どうにも理解できない。
column2: せつめいをきいても、どうにもりかいできない。
column3: No matter how I hear the explanation, I just can't understand.
column4: どうにも (no matter what, there's just nothing one can do, absolutely cannot)
column5: どうにも + Verb-ない / どうにも〜ない
column6: expresses complete helplessness or impossibility despite any attempts; 'no matter what I try, I just can't'
column8: どうにも = total helpless impossibility; どうしても = no matter how hard; いくらも = no matter how much; なかなか〜ない = not easily
